user_intention: To change the doctor or appointment time if the initially requested doctor is not available at the preferred time.

conversation.content: Hi, I need to book a doctor's appointment.
Sure, I can help with that. Can I have your name, please?
It's Alex.
Thank you, Alex. Which doctor would you like to book an appointment with?
Dr. Smith, please.
Got it. What day would you prefer for the appointment?
Monday would be great.
And what time would you prefer to start the appointment?
Around 10 AM.
Could you please describe your symptoms?
I have a headache and a slight fever.
<Call API> doctor_schedule({'Name': 'Dr. Smith', 'Day': 'Monday', 'StartTimeHour': '10', 'PatientName': 'Alex', 'Symptoms': 'headache and fever', 'RequestType': 'Check'})
Message: Dr. Smith is not available at 10 AM on Monday.
Unfortunately, Dr. Smith is not available at that time. Would you like to try a different time or another doctor?
Can we try Dr. Johnson instead?
<Call API> doctor_schedule({'Name': 'Dr. Johnson', 'Day': 'Monday', 'StartTimeHour': '10', 'PatientName': 'Alex', 'Symptoms': 'headache and fever', 'RequestType': 'Check'})
Message: Dr. Johnson is available at 10 AM on Monday.
Dr. Johnson is available at 10 AM on Monday. Would you like to confirm this appointment?
Actually, can we make it 11 AM instead?
<Call API> doctor_schedule({'Name': 'Dr. Johnson', 'Day': 'Monday', 'StartTimeHour': '11', 'PatientName': 'Alex', 'Symptoms': 'headache and fever', 'RequestType': 'Check'})
Message: Dr. Johnson is available at 11 AM on Monday.
Dr. Johnson is available at 11 AM on Monday. Would you like to confirm this appointment?
Yes, please confirm it.
<Call API> doctor_schedule({'Name': 'Dr. Johnson', 'Day': 'Monday', 'StartTimeHour': '11', 'PatientName': 'Alex', 'Symptoms': 'headache and fever', 'RequestType': 'Book'})
Message: Your appointment with Dr. Johnson at 11 AM on Monday is confirmed.
Your appointment with Dr. Johnson at 11 AM on Monday is confirmed. Is there anything else you need assistance with?
No, that's all. Thanks!

user_intention: To find out if a specific doctor is available on a chosen day and time for an appointment.

Sure, I can help with that. May I have your name, please?
Oh, I was just wondering if you knew the best pizza place in town.
I'm here to help with booking appointments. Could you please provide your name for the appointment?
It's Alex.
Thanks, Alex. Which day would you like to book the appointment with Dr. Smith?
Friday, as I mentioned.
Perfect. What time on Friday would you prefer for the appointment?
Can you tell me about Dr. Smith's availability on that day instead?

Let's say 3 PM.
Could you also describe your symptoms?
Just a regular check-up.

Yes, please book it.
<Call API> doctor_schedule({'Name': 'Dr. Smith', 'Day': 'Friday', 'StartTimeHour': '15', 'PatientName': 'Alex', 'Symptoms': 'Regular check-up', 'RequestType': 'BookAppointment'})

Your appointment with Dr. Smith has been successfully booked for 3 PM on Friday. Is there anything else I can assist you with?
No, that's all. Thanks!
